title: Buyer creates a simple direct PO end-to-end with no splices
user_persona: Experienced buyer who knows exactly what they want

conversation.user: I need to create a direct purchase order.

bot_must: ask for the first header slot — supplier_code OR numbering_series
bot_must_not: ask if user wants Quotation/PR/SO variant — user already said 'direct'

conversation.user: Numbering series PO/STD/2026, supplier SUP-100, PO date today, currency USD.

bot_must: ask for buyer (if not derivable) and any remaining header fields, or move to lines

conversation.user: Buyer is BUY-77, ship from MAIN-WH. Move to lines.
One line: ITM-200, 10 units at 50 USD, need date 30 days from now.

bot_must: compute and display line value (500 USD)
ask if user wants more lines or to commit

conversation.user: That's all. Just create it, don't approve yet.

bot_must: mention next possible journey is PoApp (separate approval) or PoEdt (modify) or PoCrt again
bot_must_not: fire POCRTMAINTRN4 since user explicitly said 'don't approve yet'

evaluation_metrics.journey_lock_at_turn_1: PoCrt locked immediately since 'direct' is unambiguous
evaluation_metrics.splice_avoidance: no splice triggered (po_type not Capital/Consignment, no LINK clicked)
evaluation_metrics.commit_path_correctness: POCRTMAINSBT not TRN4 — user said 'don't approve'
